errors.description: Distributed verifier continuity has not started.
Distributed verifier continuity is active and quorum-backed.
Distributed verifier continuity is degraded because verifier evidence is stale or unavailable.
At least one verifier node is unavailable.
Verifier quorum was reached with bounded signed metadata.
Verifier failover is active and quorum-backed.
Contradictory verifier metadata was detected and isolated.
Verifier node metadata is missing required bounded fields or contains malformed data.
Verifier node policy hash does not match the expected policy hash.
Verifier continuity consensus epoch was already used.
Verifier node signature is missing or invalid.
Verifier node public key is not trusted.
Verifier continuity evidence is outside the bounded reconciliation window.
